endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/providerOperations
endpoints.description: Gets provider operations metadata for all resource providers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/providerOperations/{resourceProviderNamespace}
endpoints.description: Gets provider operations metadata for the specified resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace.
